objective:
Objectif: Générer un objectif de stratégie unique en utilisant les familles robustes et angles prometteurs décrits précédemment, tout en respectant les contraintes de diversification et en étant créatif avec des combinaisons inhabituelles d'indicateurs, des filtres originaux et des approches multi-timeframe.

Dans cette stratégie, nous allons explorer un axe 'hors sentiers battus', qui est la génération de comportements aleatoires pour notre modèle en utilisant l'inverseure du temps d'entrée/sortie et le mode d'offbeat. En outre, nous allons proposer une hypothese testable et falsifiable avec un lien à la fois avec les familles robustes et les angles prometteurs pour éviter des formulations génériques de type 'RSI<30/RSI>70' sans filtre additionnel.

Pour ce qui est des entrées, nous allons utiliser un filtre anti-faux-signaux (confirmation inverse partielle) pour éviter les signaux faux et une gestion du risque non linéaire pour s'adapter à la volatilité de notre marché. Nous utiliserons aussi des combina

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy uses Bollinger Bands and ATR for trend confirmation with RSI as a momentum filter to generate high quality trading signals. The combination of these robust indicators enhances the performance while reducing noise from ranging markets, resulting in an overall more profitable strategy.

This strategy will improve performance by using the Bollinger bands and ATR as a filter for trend confirmation followed by an RSI overbought/oversold signal to generate buy signals when the market is oversold or overbought with strong trending price action. This approach reduces the number of false signals in ranging markets while also taking advantage of significant trend movements. The risk management will use ATR based stop loss and take profit levels.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses Bollinger bands and ATR to confirm trends followed by RSI overbought/oversold signals for generating buy signals. It aims to reduce false signals in ranging markets while exploiting significant trend movements.
[Backup plan] If the results are poor (negative return), I would consider changing the filter conditions or adjusting stop loss levels. If they are mediocre (low Sharpe ratio), I could experiment with different ATR-based stop loss and take profit levels, as well as exploring other risk management techniques like hedging.

iterations.hypothesis: Our strategy will improve performance by using a combination of RSI and ATR to identify trend strength and volatility levels

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] We will iterate on our strategy by incorporating additional indicators and filters to improve its performance. We will also test different combinations of these components and explore other timeframes in order to generate more robust results. Additionally, we plan to use a combination of statistical tests and visualizations to validate the effectiveness of our approach. If our current hypothesis does not yield satisfactory returns, we may consider adding additional filters or adjusting parameters. In case of mediocre performance, we will focus on improving trade frequency and optimizing position sizing.
[Backup plan] Iteration 4: We plan to incorporate more indicators and filters into our strategy in order to improve its robustness and accuracy. This could include using other technical indicators such as Bollinger Bands, MACD or stochastic oscillators, as well as incorporating fundamental data. Additionally, we will explore different timeframes for each indicator to better capture short-term trends and volatility. We will also test the performance of our strategy across different asset classes in order to validate its applicability. If results remain mediocre, we will focus on optimizing trade frequency and position sizing.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy is an attempt to uncover hidden patterns in the market using a random combination of indicators and filters. The use of anti-false signal filter, non-linear risk management, stochastic and CCI as entry long conditions are all attempts to enhance performance. However, this iteration has not yet yielded any results so it's difficult to ascertain its effectiveness. Potential weaknesses include overfitting the data due to randomness in filtering criteria or indicators used. If returns are negative, an adjustment could be made by focusing on fewer, more relevant filters and indicators instead of random combination.
[Backup plan] If current strategy fails, a possible alternative approach would be to incorporate machine learning techniques for prediction such as decision tree classifier, Random Forest etc., considering the historical data available. This might help in identifying patterns that are not easily noticeable using traditional strategies.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy is an attempt to uncover hidden patterns in the market using a random combination of indicators and filters. The use of anti-false signal filter, non-linear risk management, stochastic and CCI as entry long conditions are all attempts to enhance performance. However, this iteration has not yet yielded any results so it's difficult to ascertain its effectiveness. Potential weaknesses include overfitting the data due to randomness in filtering criteria or indicators used. If returns are negative, an adjustment could be made by focusing on fewer, more relevant filters and indicators instead of random combination.
[Backup plan] If current strategy fails, a possible alternative approach would be to incorporate machine learning techniques for prediction such as decision tree classifier, Random Forest etc., considering the historical data available. This might help in identifying patterns that are not easily noticeable using traditional strategies.
